- Thunder 的Westbrook 時代經歷11年後正式完結，這小城球隊將進入重建模式；Westbrook & Thunder 的最後一幕是Lillard 的超遠程buzzer-beater

- 在未來6屆選秀會，Thunder 持有15個首輪選秀權 (包括4個pick swap的選項)

- CP3 有可能會被Thunder 再次交易 (Steven Adams 也可能被交易)，而現時有消息指交易對象可能是Heat；但不論34歲的CP3 最後在哪隊落戶，也難想像他跟總冠軍的距離有近了 (CP3 去Lakers 不是沒可能，但buyout 不簡單)

- Rockets 繼續保持積極實驗性，秉承過去幾季以衝擊總冠軍爲目標的組軍理念

- Mike D’Antoni 要作出什麼調整才能讓Harden 和Westbrook 這兩個high-usage、ball-dominant 後衛發揮效力？D’Antoni 可算全聯盟最劍走偏鋒的教練，曾數次帶領非主流陣容、戰術在常規賽取得重大成功

- 季後賽才是Daryl Morey 和Rockets 的着眼點，而加入Westbrook 換走CP3 會讓Rockets 在對Lakers/Clippers/Warriors/Nuggets 等的matchup 有什麼優勢？

- 上兩次雙MVP陣容贏得總冠軍是Curry/Durant (2017, 2018) 和Robinson/Duncan (2003)

- 去季Thunder 贏49場，Rockets 贏53場，處身殺氣騰騰的西岸荒原Rockets 來季能進步多少？

- Clint Capela 已率先在社交媒體歡迎Westbrook 的到來

- 交易消息傳出之後，CP3 和Harden 合演的電視廣告還在美國播放

- 極力誌籃球 Clutch

I'm a fan of Chris Paul. He was certainly a very exciting slam dunker who was worth his weight in gold to Houston Rockets. Don't get me wrong- I still enjoy watching him play even though his prime has passed. He proved his worth to his team by helping win multiple championships. His worth to Rockets was incalculable. I must say he's made dramatic progress with his three point shooting over the past seven months. Unfortunately his leg injury has progressed fairly rapidly forcing him to be sidelined for six months because of his injury. He has a follow-up to the doctor next month. His friend LeBron James will also be out of commission until his back heals. He hasn't made much progress with his shootings since he injured his back. His doctor said he was making good progress and will check on his progress next month. He assigned the blame for his back injury to a lack of training and stretching. Oh well it could be worse. His worth of contribution to Lakers is incalculable. In my opinion, Lakers is as likely to beat Cavaliers as Warriors. Just the other month, Lakers didn't just beat Raptors. They wiped the floor with them. Everybody was on the edge of their seats. Raptors lost its edge to some extent after their scoring leader John left the team. Bulls edged out Lakers by two points. It reminds me of Warriors edging out Cavaliers by four points. The responsibilities of every coach in every team are well defined. Everyone has an important role to play in every team. In addition, the government has appointed a commission to look at the use of steroids among players. Another commission has also been established to examine family violence in NBA which I wholeheartedly support. There's a supplement shop near the official Houston Rockets arena, Toyota Center in Houston, Texas. The cost of a tub of soy protein has edged lower by ten dollars whereas the cost of a tub of whey protein has edged up from two hundred to two hundred and fifty dollars. The cost of creatine has edged down from one hundred to ninety two dollars while the cost of multi-vitamins has edged higher by eleven dollars.

Just the other month, Houston Rockets was defeated by Chicago Bulls. It kept me on the edge of my seat the entire time. Apparently the scoring leader in Rockets suffered a minor injury which took the edge of their performance. Both are fantastic teams but in a rematch I think Bulls will edge the game.
